name: CRISP
description: A BA/PM framework for AI builders. Full product discovery — problem definition, stakeholder mapping, user journeys, tech stack, and sprint-ready AI specs — before you write a single line of code.
author: radekamirko

skills.name: phase1-clarify
skills.description: C — Clarify: Problem definition, painkiller test, buy vs build, market research, SWOT, Go/No-Go.

skills.name: phase2-results
skills.description: R — Results: Stakeholder register, baseline measurement, success metrics, HITL zones.

skills.name: phase3-investigate
skills.description: I — Investigate: Process mapping, user journey maps, UX discovery, project goals.

skills.name: phase4-spec
skills.description: S — Spec: Tech stack, backlog, MVP prioritization, AI specs, sprint planning, CLAUDE.md.

skills.name: phase5-prove
skills.description: P — Prove: Validate against Phase R baseline. Did the needle move?
